text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mwahahahah... Now is the hour! From the
shadows, once again, I get to observe the
precious figures of all my Umas.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Digital, do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Gahjklf?! O-O-Oguri?! H-have you some business
with me?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I've got a somewhat special training session
planned for today. I was looking for someone to
join me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Somewhat special?! Oh, those two words ring so sweet in my ears! I will burn your gloriousness into my mind to remember forever...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want to practice my skills on both turf and dirt.
So I was thinking of someone who's learned about
both.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Which made me think, "I should definitely ask
Digital."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Yes, yes, ask Digital! That's a... That's...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! Th-th-that's me!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Do you not want to? I thought you were the
perfect choice...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It isn't that I don't want to! It's simply... the
chances of you asking... I would've expected the
Earth to split in two before that! Eegh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Th-this isn't good! I think I'm... hyperventilating... Cough!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Not feeling well? Or worse...
are you hungry?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... I guess that puts a partner run out of the
question. Sorry for bothering you when you're
unwell.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What?! Oguri... looks... disappointed! Because of... me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HWAAAAH! DIGITAN IS RESURRECTED!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'll do it! Please, allow me to accompany you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Are you feeling okay now?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm in tip-top shape! Upsetting a lovely Horsegirl
is a direct violation of otaku doctrine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I, Digitan, will put my entire heart and soul into
running by your side!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's kind of weird, but I'm glad you've got all
your energy back. I'll see you at the gate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I get to see Oguri running up close... Her temperature, her breath work, her oozing emotions... It's so sublime, I could keel over...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But if I'm to become a cornerstone in an Horsegirl's
path to success, then I have no need for
tomorrow!
